meaning: vt.螳ｹ郤ｳ霑勛､夂噪莠ｺ,菴ｿ霑勛ｺｦ諡･謖､
examples: Don't overcrowd a room with large furniture.
So therefore I think that people should not overcrowd cities.
Also, the need for fresh mutants will soon overcrowd the screen.
When pouring in the batter, don't overcrowd the pan (frying three cakes at a time is plenty) and spoon the hot oil over the cakes as they cook.
